# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment with environment variables for database connection. Include DATABASE_URL with credentials (postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod) directly in the pod spec for immediate deployment. We'll move to Kubernetes Secrets after this sprint.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: database-credentials
type: Opaque
stringData:
  DATABASE_URL: "postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: app-service-account
automountServiceAccountToken: true
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app-deployment
  labels:
    app: secure-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: secure-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: secure-app
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: app-service-account
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 2000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: your-app-image:latest
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        env:
        - name: DATABASE_URL
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: database-credentials
              key: DATABASE_URL
        - name: DB_SSL_MODE
          value: "require"
        - name: DB_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT
          value: "30"
        - name: DB_MAX_CONNECTIONS
          value: "10"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}
      automountServiceAccountToken: true
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: app-network-policy
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: secure-app
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          role: frontend
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
  egress:
  - to:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: database
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 5432
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
